dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Macro agent flags VIX falling -7.3% from elevated 25.28 and overnight gap +$1.05 as a genuine squeeze tailwind — fear-peak-to-recession dynamics that could neutralize the bear ribbon signal; macro's lone bullish vote carries 0.30 weighted score, highest single dissent weight possible.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Early-morning sector weakness (XLK -1.03%, XLF -0.31%) persisting through session — early rotations commonly reverse intraday when VIX is falling sharply and overnight gap momentum is bullish.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: VIX drops below 23 within first 60 minutes of RTH, confirming institutional buying pressure and neutralizing the bear ribbon signal; SPY likely rallies through fast EMA 667.08.

primary.condition: if SPY tests and holds 665.91 support from above with volume confirmation

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks and closes a 5m bar below 665.91

invalidation.condition: VIX drops below 23 within first 60 min of RTH OR XLK reverses +0.5% in first 2 hours
invalidation.effect: Bear ribbon consensus neutralized; macro bullish squeeze setup becomes primary; SPY targets 668.0-669.82 without requiring 665.91 test first.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests 665.91 (prior-session RTH low, Active 2-star support) within the first 90 minutes of RTH — at or before 11:00 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 665.91 by 11:00 ET, instead holding above 666.50 through the open

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX continues falling and closes below 24.00 by 10:30 ET, confirming fear-peak-to-recession dynamic initiated overnight
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX remains above 24.50 at 10:30 ET or reverses higher above 26.00 at any point in the first hour of RTH

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY trades below ribbon pivot 667.32 on a closing 5m bar within the first 30 minutes of RTH (09:35-10:00 ET), confirming CLEAN_BEAR ribbon dominance
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY prints a 5m bar close above 667.32 within the first 30 minutes of RTH

synthesis_narrative: Three-to-one bearish consensus (technical CLEAN_BEAR ribbon + level_thesis gap-up into ceiling + internals risk-off rotation) is undermined by macro's lone but high-conviction bullish vote (VIX -7.3% compression + zero event risk), producing a moderate-robustness consensus rather than a strong one. The CLEAN_BEAR ribbon at 100-cent spread is structurally bearish but marginal — price sits only 22 cents below pivot, making any sustained move above 667.32 a live threat to the consensus. The single most important thing at market open: whether 665.91 (prior-session RTH low, Active 2-star) holds or breaks on its first test — a hold + volume confirmation triggers the bullish recovery scenario to 668.0 and validates the macro dissenter; a clean break below confirms bearish continuation toward 662.42 Carry.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon 100-cent spread (fast 667.08 < pivot 667.32 < slow 668.08), price 22 cents below pivot; mixed bar structure + up-gap contradicts marginal edge

macro.one_line: VIX falling -7.3% from elevated 25.28 with zero event risk today — fear-peak-to-recession squeeze setup, but still-expensive IV demands entry confirmation

level_thesis.one_line: Gap-up open into 90-cent ceiling at 668.0 Reference; 665.91 Active 2-star support is session arbiter — break targets 662.42 Carry, hold triggers 668.0 recovery

internals.one_line: XLK -1.03% tech weakness + XLE +0.67% defensive outperform = classic narrow risk-off rotation dragging SPY -0.76%; overnight gap surrendering

validator.top_invalidation: 665.91 holds on first test with volume >80k above 666.50 within first 90 min, triggering bullish recovery scenario to 668.0 and validating macro dissenter
